description: Sector overlay for law firms, legal practitioners, legal-service documentation, client matters, legal ethics, and OHADA/business-law documents in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Law and Legal. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Ordre des Avocats du Togo official portal
WAEMU legal profession ethics and training framework overview

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and must be reviewed by qualified legal/compliance professionals.

rules.title: Bar registration, lawyer status, or authority evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Togolese bar registration, lawyer status, bar association, counsel, or professional authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Ordre des Avocats du Togo official portal

rules.title: Client confidentiality or professional secrecy controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for professional secrecy, client confidentiality, privileged communication, or client-file protection.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Conflict-of-interest and independence controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for conflict checks, independence, loyalty, impartiality, or professional-ethics language.

rules.title: Fee, engagement, or client-care terms are documented
rules.summary: Checks for engagement letters, fee terms, retainers, billing, scope of work, or client instructions.

rules.title: OHADA business-law routing evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for OHADA, RCCM, company, securities, commercial or business-law references in legal documents.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: AML/CFT client due-diligence routing is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for client due diligence, beneficial owner, source of funds, suspicious transaction, or AML routing in legal-service documents.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
